{{Quote|Lian has been given over to me so I may instill in him the proper passions of a warrior.|Shedao Shai|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''</ref>}}
'''Deign Lian''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] and the ambitious subordinate of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Shedao Shai]].

==Biography==
While [[Domain Lian]] was known to be ruthless in battle, Deign Lian showed none of his clan's ruthlessness. He constantly questioned Shai's orders, and was often humiliated and beaten by Shai for it. However, he was secretly taking orders from [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]], who had yet to arrive in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and hoped to [[Escalation|escalate]] to Shai's leadership position if he should fail. When Shai was killed by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] at the [[Battle of Ithor]], Lian ordered the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces to unleash a biological weapon on [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]], which rendered the planet uninhabitable. Lian, however, did not live long enough to enjoy his command. He was killed when the ''[[Legacy of Torment]]'' was destroyed.

{{Char-stub}}
